code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Proposed)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {
        [*] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (via Geofence or similar)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (manually or by system)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (e.g. Valet Queue)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (e.g. Valet Retrieval Start)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (from free-roam)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (e.g. slot freed)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [*]
        CompletedOperational --> [*]
        Cancelled --> [*]
        FailedToEnter --> [*]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [*]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Parallel State)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {
        [*] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (EnteredLot)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (via Billing Service)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (e.g. quick pass-through within grace)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Still finalized, just with zero amount)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [*]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [*]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (internal, signals op tasks done)
      - Cancelled (e.g. no-show)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Conceptual)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Operational) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Billing) can influence ExitedLot (Operational) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus设计一个完整的车辆访问状态图。核心思路是把运营状态和计费状态做成两个并行状态机，因为实际业务中这两者并不是完全同步的。
明白了，所以VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus是两个独立的并行状态区域。我先从运营侧开始画，第一个状态应该是Planned对吗？对应预约确认后的初始状态。
对的，Planned是起点。然后车辆接近停车场时，通过地理围栏触发PendingEntry状态，这个过渡需要标注清楚触发条件。
已添加Planned到PendingEntry的转换，标注了Vehicle Nearing Lot。那PendingEntry之后呢？是不是有两个分支？
是的，正常流程是车辆到达入口闸机，ANPR识别成功后进入EnteredLot。但还有一个异常分支：如果预约过期或者no show，就转到Cancelled状态。
好的，我画出了PendingEntry到EnteredLot的主路径，以及到Cancelled的异常路径。EnteredLot之后车辆已经进场，但还没完成泊位分配对吗？
没错，EnteredLot之后会先进入ActiveInLot，这时候车辆可能在自由漫游，等待系统或人工分配泊位。这里要分出AwaitingSlotAssignment状态，专门处理代客泊车队列的情况。
理解了，AwaitingSlotAssignment就是车辆在停车场里但还没泊位，比如排队等代客泊车。那SlotAssigned之后呢？车辆离场有哪些路径？
SlotAssigned之后有两个去向：一是正常离场到ExitedLot，二是如果代客泊车取车开始，车辆离开泊位但还没离场，就回到ActiveInLot的自由漫游状态。
已添加这两个转换。我注意到ActiveInLot也可以直接到ExitedLot，标注了from free-roam，这是为了覆盖没有固定泊位的快速离场场景吧？
完全正确。ExitedLot之后还有一个CompletedOperational状态，表示运营侧的后处理完成，比如泊位释放、现场清理等内部操作。
运营主流程基本清晰了。但我注意到还需要处理各种异常，比如系统故障、车辆困在场内的情况。是否需要Interrupted状态？
非常需要。EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment这几个活跃状态都应该能进入Interrupted。Interrupted之后可以手动放行到ExitedLot，也可能变成Abandoned。
已添加Interrupted的入口和出口。还有一个EmergencyEvacuated状态，看起来是从多个状态都能进入？
是的，紧急疏散是全局事件，EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment、甚至Interrupted都能触发EmergencyEvacuated。另外Planned和PendingEntry也可能FailedToEnter。
运营状态机结构基本完成。现在来看VisitBilling这个并行状态。它的起点也是[*]，第一个状态是PendingPriceQuote？
对，计费状态机从车辆EnteredLot时启动，进入PendingPriceQuote等待定价服务响应。得到PriceQuoteReceived后进入PendingPayment等待客户确认支付。
客户发起支付后进入PaymentInProgress，成功则到PaymentConfirmed，失败则到PaymentFailed。PaymentFailed可以重试回到PendingPayment，这个循环我理解对吗？
正确。但PaymentFailed多次失败后，或者出现争议，需要进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention人工介入。另外PaymentConfirmed之后是BillingFinalized_Paid。
我注意到还有一个GraceExempt_NoCharge分支，从PendingPriceQuote直接过来。这是处理免费时段快速通行的场景？
没错，比如15分钟内免费离场的情况。虽然是零金额，但也要走BillingFinalized_Paid完成计费闭环，只是标注为still finalized, just with zero amount。
已添加GraceExempt_NoCharge路径。RequiresManualBillingIntervention有两个出口：BillingFinalized_Paid和BillingFinalized_Unpaid，后者是核销或延期的情况？
是的，BillingFinalized_Unpaid就是坏账或者协商延期。现在两个并行状态机都画完了，但需要在note里补充状态清单，方便开发人员查阅。
已添加右侧注释，列出了VisitOperationalStatus的所有状态。我注意到CompletedOperational标注了internal, signals op tasks done，这个说明很重要。
对，CompletedOperational是内部状态，通知其他系统运营任务已完成。同样VisitBilling的注释也要完整列出所有计费状态。
第二个注释也添加完成了。我注意到代码里有一段说明，提到ExitedLot和PaymentConfirmed之间有概念上的关联，但Mermaid不好表达这种非时间同步的并行关系。
没错，实际业务中ExitedLot可能触发最终计费动作，而PaymentConfirmed也可能影响闸机开闭，但这两个状态机确实是并行管理的，由VisitLifecycleStateMachine统一协调。
整体结构已经完整了。我检查一下终态：运营侧有Abandoned、CompletedOperational、Cancelled、FailedToEnter、EmergencyEvacuated都指向[*]；计费侧是BillingFinalized_Paid和BillingFinalized_Unpaid。数量对吗？
运营侧终态完整。不过我突然想到，AwaitingSlotAssignment到SlotAssigned的转换条件，需要明确是manually or by system，这个标注了吗？
感谢提醒，我补上了这个标注。另外ActiveInLot到SlotAssigned的转换也需要同样的标注，刚才漏掉了。
还有一个细节：EnteredLot到ActiveInLot的描述是Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam，这个or很重要，体现了两种子状态。
已确认描述准确。我再看一下Cancelled的触发条件，目前是Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry，是否需要区分这两种情况为不同状态？
不需要细分，业务上都是Cancelled终态。但Abandoned和EmergencyEvacuated要区分清楚：Abandoned是车辆长期滞留后被标记弃置，EmergencyEvacuated是紧急模式强制疏散。
明白了，这两个终态的业务含义确实不同。图表现在基本完整了，标题我设置为Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Proposed)，状态图版本用stateDiagram-v2。
最后确认一下，VisitOperational和VisitBilling的命名，以及各自的别名VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus都正确设置了？
都已正确设置，使用state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational的语法。两个并行状态的视觉区分也很清晰。
很好。这个状态图涵盖了正常流程、代客泊车场景、免费快速通行、支付失败重试、人工介入、系统中断、紧急疏散等完整业务场景，可以提交评审了。
已完成最终检查，所有状态转换、触发条件、终态和注释都已落实。Mermaid代码可以渲染为清晰的状态图，准备提交。
